items.title: Discuss internally whether to participate in Opti's preemptive round
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 28: 'We closed our first deal earlier this week... our existing investors want to preempt with an internal quick round. Is it worth to catch up for 10 mins to share where everyone's at?'

items.title: Follow up with Roy Katmor on Orchid round dynamics
items.context: Email from Jake on May 27 following up on round dynamics — no reply received yet. Roy previously noted he passed on a TS and expects more in coming weeks.

items.title: Send Simone Garreau intro to Banxware
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital on May 31: 'On the company side, will send you an intro to Banxware' — commitment made to Simone ahead of SuperVenture Berlin.

items.title: Check if SumUp is interested in meeting Prism Layer
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital on May 31: 'will see if SumUp is interested in meeting — they're a scaled/late stage company and tend to build in-house.'

items.title: Prep for NYTW / CISO Breakfast with Thoropass
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass attendees (claire.lamb, javier, sam) — no agenda attached yet.

items.title: Prep for Poolside quarterly check-in
items.context: Calendar event 'Poolside <> Fin: Quarterly Check In' on Jun 3 with portfolio company Poolside (paul, jeff, isaac) — recurring quarterly update.

items.title: Prep for Certa bi-monthly catch-up
items.context: Calendar event 'Bi-monthly Catch-up: Certa <> Fin Capital' on Jun 4 with portfolio company Certa (theo, brian.shaw, emilia, jag).

items.title: Prep for Dakota meeting with Kate O'Connor
items.context: Calendar event 'Meeting with Kate O'Connor' from Dakota on Jun 1 — LP relationship meeting with lauren@fin.capital and diane@fin.capital.
